## 📜 Policy & Regulatory Intelligence — 12 Key Updates

### 1. RBI Repo Rate — 5.25% (Multi-Year Low)
- 75bps cuts in 2025: June (50bps → 5.50%) + December (25bps → 5.25%)
- Home loans: HDFC 7.20%, SBI 7.25%, ICICI 7.45%, Axis 8.00%
- **Broker Action:** EMI on ₹60L (20yr) is now ~₹46K vs ~₹53K in 2023. Show this calculation to fence-sitters.

### 2. Stamp Duty — Women Save 1%, 3-Year Resale Rule
- Pune: 7% (men) / 6% (women) + 1% registration (capped ₹30K)
- 3-year resale: buyer pays stamp duty only on price increase — not full value
- Senior living: flat ₹1,000 stamp duty
- **Broker Action:** Always check if wife/mother can be primary registrant. On ₹80L = ₹80,000 saved.

### 3. MahaRERA 2025 - 1,905+ Projects Suspended
- **What Changed:** Mandatory QR codes on all advertisements (₹50K penalty per instance).
- 1,905+ projects suspended state-wide in a major compliance sweep (with Pune leading the breakdown), bank accounts frozen for non-reporting
- Circular 50/2025: SOP for allottee defaults
- **Broker Action:** Scan QR on every project. Visit maharera.mahaonline.gov.in before every client meeting.

### 4. PMAY-Urban 2.0 — Up to ₹2.67L Subsidy
- EWS (≤₹3L), LIG (₹3–6L), MIG (up to ₹9L) eligible
- Must not own pucca house anywhere in India
- Women-headed households preferred
- **Broker Action:** Ask income in first client call. Under ₹9L = PMAY eligible. Apply at pmaymis.gov.in.

### 5. Pune Metro Line 3 — 94%+ Complete, Imminent Inauguration
- Hinjewadi–Shivajinagar corridor nearing opening
- Phase 2 (Khadakwasla–Kharadi, Wagholi) in survey/tender
- TOD zones: higher FSI + mixed-use within 500m of metro stations
- **Broker Action:** Properties near Line 3 stations will spike 15–20% post-inauguration. Buy before opening.

### 6. Ring Road — Critical Investment Entry Window 2025–2026
- Connects all 4 major highways around Pune
- 12–18% YoY appreciation along corridor since announcement
- Projected 25–30% cumulative gain on completion
- Key zones: Pirangut, Wagholi, Kharadi, Chakan, Talegaon
- **Broker Action:** Best investor pitch for 2025–2026. Entry under ₹70L still available.

### 7. Maharashtra 'Majhe Ghar, Majha Adhikar' — 35L Homes by 2030
- ₹70,000Cr investment framework. Self-Redevelopment Cell (₹2,000Cr)
- AI-powered SHIP portal, faster approvals, PPP model
- **Broker Action:** Track MHADA/CIDCO lottery announcements for affordable buyer pipeline.

### 8. GST 2.0 — September 2025
- Buyer rates UNCHANGED: 1% affordable u/c, 5% non-affordable u/c, 0% ready-to-move
- Cement GST 28%→18% — lower developer costs
- **Broker Action:** 0% GST on ready-to-move saves ₹4L on ₹80L property. Use as closing argument.

### 9. PMC TDR Reforms — Faster Approvals
- 90-day TDR processing deadline, documents 40→20, dedicated TDR cell
- TOD zones near metro: higher FSI + mixed-use permitted
- **Broker Action:** Near-ready inventory in TOD zones offers best current value before supply surge.

### 10. SRA Cluster Scheme — FSI Above 4 for Large Slums
- Cluster Scheme: 50+ acre slums, FSI above 4
- Section 33-B: directors personally liable for unpaid transit rent
- Blockchain approvals, Aadhaar/PAN linking for residents
- **Broker Action:** Verify free-sale freeze compliance in any SRA project before recommending.

### 11. Home Loan EBLR Linkage
- All floating loans linked to EBLR (Repo + Spread). Future cuts auto-pass through.
- CIBIL 750+ critical for best starting rates
- **Broker Action:** Help clients improve CIBIL before applying. 750+ vs 700 = 0.25–0.5% better rate.

### 12. Pune Market Conditions — May 2026
- Balanced-to-seller in prime zones; buyer-favorable in periphery
- YoY: 5–12% broad, up to 25% in infrastructure corridors
- ₹78L avg ticket size. 19% transactions above ₹1Cr (up from 14%)
- Rental yield: 3–4% mid-segment
- **Broker Action:** Ready-to-move closes 40% faster. Emphasize developer track record and RERA compliance.

## ⚡ Top 10 Broker Scripts for Client Calls — 24 May 2026

1. **EMI Urgency:** "HDFC from 7.20%, SBI from 7.25%. EMI on ₹60L is ₹46K/month — was ₹53K in 2023. You're saving ₹84,000/year. This window won't stay open."
2. **RERA Trust:** "Scan this QR code on the project brochure - it pulls live data from MahaRERA. 1,905+ projects were suspended state-wide in a major compliance sweep (with Pune leading the breakdown). This one is compliant."
3. **Metro Line 3:** "94% of construction is done, inauguration is imminent. Every metro corridor in India has jumped 20% post-opening. Mumbai, Bengaluru — Pune is next. Buy before the premium."
4. **Women Buyer:** "If we register in your wife's name, she pays 6% stamp duty instead of 7%. On this property that's ₹80,000 saved on day one — before EMIs even start."
5. **Zero GST:** "This property has the OC received. That means ZERO GST. The under-construction one next door costs ₹80L but with 5% GST you actually pay ₹84L. Ready-to-move wins."
6. **PMAY Subsidy:** "Your annual income is under ₹9 lakhs and you don't own a home anywhere. You qualify for PMAY-U 2.0 — the government subsidises your home loan interest. That's up to ₹2.67 lakhs in your pocket."
7. **Mahalunge Pitch:** "Mahalunge is appreciating at 10–14% per year — fastest in Pune. It's at ₹9,000–13,000/sqft while Baner next door is ₹16,000. You're buying at Baner 2019 prices with 2026 infrastructure."
8. **Ring Road Investor:** "The Ring Road connects all 4 highways. Properties here are up 12–18% annually since announcement. On completion? Experts project 25–30% cumulative. Entry is now — not after inauguration."
9. **National Brands Signal:** "Birla Estates, Adani Realty, Prestige Group, Lodha — all entered Pune in 2025 simultaneously. These are listed companies with institutional investors. When they all choose Pune, that's stronger validation than any analyst report."
10. **3-Year Resale Rule:** "If you ever need to sell within 3 years, the buyer only pays stamp duty on the price increase — not the full property value. That removes the biggest objection investors have. Your exit is protected."
